name: Asparagus Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the chicken in oil.
2. In a saucepan, combine flour and melted butter. Stir in chicken broth and cook until thickened. Remove from heat and stir in heavy cream and Tabasco sauce.
3. Place asparagus at the bottom of a 9x13 inch casserole dish. Arrange chicken on top of the asparagus.
4. Pour the sauce over the chicken and asparagus. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
5. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
